summary: Complete frontend testing of /brands page redesign using Precision Craft design system. All 10 sections verified: HERO, Top Brands Quick Nav, Brand Filter Tabs + Grid, Brand Tiers, Why Choose FixitBay, FAQ, Brand Repair Pages Index, Final CTA, Footer, Floating Button + Mobile Bar. All design requirements met including colors (navy #0D1B2A, accent #FF5722, cream #F8F5F0), Montserrat font, grayscale-to-color hover effect on brand logos, MOST POPULAR badges on Bosch/Samsung/Whirlpool/LG, and SEO meta tags.
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 sections render correctly with proper data-testid attributes

Section 1 HERO: Background image with gradient overlay (rgba(13,27,42,0.96)), eyebrow 'APPLIANCE BRAND REPAIR — BAY AREA', H1, trust badges (Licensed Technicians, Same/Next Day, 180-Day Warranty, OEM Parts), Call and Book buttons - all present
Section 2 TOP BRANDS: Dark bg #0D1B2A, 10 brand pill buttons that anchor-scroll to brand cards correctly
Section 3 BRAND GRID: Sticky filter tabs (All 25/Premium 8/Standard 12/Commercial 5), 4-column grid, MOST POPULAR badges on Bosch/Samsung/Whirlpool/LG, grayscale(1) logos become grayscale(0) on hover
Section 3 Filters: Premium shows 8 brands, Standard shows 12, Commercial shows 5 - all correct
Section 4 BRAND TIERS: Dark bg #0D1B2A, 3 cards side by side (Premium & Luxury, Standard Household, What Makes Premium Different), brand pills in each card
Section 5 WHY CHOOSE: Cream bg #F8F5F0, 4 feature cards in 2x2 grid with icon circles
Section 6 FAQ: Dark bg #0D1B2A, 4 accordion items with chevron toggle working correctly
Section 7 BRAND REPAIR INDEX: 14 brand repair pill links all working, footer breadcrumb links preserved (services, SF repair, commercial, service areas, freezer)
Section 8 FINAL CTA: Orange bg #FF5722, white Call + Book buttons
Section 9 FOOTER: Dark bg #0D1B2A, logo, phone (760) 543-5733, copyright 2026
Section 10 FLOATING: Floating BOOK REPAIR button appears after scrolling 300px, Mobile bottom bar with CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US
SEO: Title 'Appliance Brand Repair in Bay Area | FixitBay — Bosch, Samsung, Sub-Zero & More', meta description includes key terms, canonical URL https://fixitbay.net/brands
Brand card links navigate correctly (tested Bosch, LG pages)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified /brands page redesign with Precision Craft design system. Key data-testid attributes: brands-hero, brands-hero-call, brands-hero-book, brands-top-nav, brands-grid-section, tab-all, tab-premium, tab-standard, tab-commercial, brand-card-{BrandName}, brands-tiers, brands-why, brands-faq, faq-0/1/2/3, brands-index, brand-link-{0-13}, brands-final-cta, brands-footer, brands-float-btn. Design colors verified: navy #0D1B2A (rgb(13,27,42)), accent #FF5722 (rgb(255,87,34)), cream #F8F5F0 (rgb(248,245,240)). Brand categories: Premium 8 brands, Standard 12 brands, Commercial 5 brands (total 25). MOST POPULAR badges on: Bosch, Samsung, Whirlpool, LG. All brand card links work correctly.
